resonance_events.excerpt: I've seen it described as an 'over-curated experience,' and there is a sense that it is all a little too dramatic and... too restrictive.

resonance_events.excerpt: The climax of the tour is seeing the room called the 'Holy of Holies.' It is, simply, breathtaking.
